message:
charmed_rust-thw: Add TUI pager mode with viewport scrolling

- Add Pager model using bubbles Viewport component
- Implement keyboard navigation (j/k, arrows, pgup/pgdn, g/G)
- Add status bar showing title, scroll percentage, and line numbers
- Support mouse wheel scrolling
- Add --no-pager flag for stdout output
- Handle window resize events

The glow CLI now has a full-featured TUI pager that displays
rendered markdown in a scrollable viewport with vim-style bindings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
